title: clusia octandra
intro: Clusia octandra, also known as the "clitoria" or "heartleaf," is a plant species in the Clusiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Clusia octandra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and burns. Clusia octandra can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to create remedies for various ailments.
